titleStmt.title: SII 15.161: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 161. (B.K. No. 154 of 1926-27.) BENTŪR, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a pillar in the temple of Śaṁbhuliṅga.

This is dated the 15th regnal year of the king, Bhāva, Mārgaśira ba. 8, Thursday, Saṅkramaṇa, corresponding to 1214 A.D., November 26. The weekday, however, was Wednesday and the Saṅkramaṇa was Dhanus.
It records a gift of land to the tank called Hiriyakeṟe by the god's servant Sōma. The gift land was purchased for money from the sixty-four Mahājanas of Benatūru.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.note: This is engraved in between No. 217, below.
div.p:
© svasti śrīmatu yādavanārāyaṇa pratāpacakravartti siṁgaṇadēvavaThis is engraved in between No. 217, below.
rṣada 15 bhāva saṁvatsarada mārgasira bahuḷa 8 brihaspa
tivāra saṁkramaṇadaṁdu benatūra Āṟuvattināluva
ru mahājanaṁgaḷa kayoḷu dēvarāḷu sōmanu Ara
vattaru keyyanu taṁma teṁkaṇa prathamada hasugeyi
ṁ baḍagalu hiryyakeṟeyiṁ teṁkalu Akṣōhiṇi
sahiraṇyamaṁ koṭṭu koṁḍu keṟedharmmakke biṭṭanu .
yī dharmmavanu staḷadalidavaru pratipāḷisuvaru pratipāḷisa
dirddaḍe vāraṇāsiyalu brāhmaṇaruva kavileya koṁda
pāpakke pōdavaru . bavaṁbasava
Digital edition of SII 15.161 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
